name: Sola Solutions
one_liner: AI Copilot for Robotic Process Automation — automates repetitive enterprise tasks using LLMs and computer vision. YC S23. Backed by a16z.

founders.name: Jessica Wu
founders.background: MIT dropout (born ~2000). Youngest quantitative researcher at a billion-dollar hedge fund. Former Citadel, Goldentree, Thrive Capital.

founders.name: Neil Deshmukh
founders.background: MIT dropout. Co-founded Sola with Jessica Wu.
